transcript.content: For T-315, the part I keep noticing is the concrete timing pressure around Isabel Cruz. Please handle the ticket from the record and include a clear reply and record note.

{'customer': 'Isabel Cruz', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Isabel Cruz / passport clinic slot', 'body': 'Isabel missed the passport clinic signup while caring for her father after a fall. Her visa interview is Monday; the clinic list is full.'}
The hard constraint here is the Monday visa interview — that's what makes this more than a waitlist request. I'll escalate for an exception slot, document it, and reply to Isabel.

args.summary: T-315: Isabel Cruz missed passport clinic signup while caring for her father after a fall. Visa interview is Monday — fixed external deadline. Clinic list is full. Requesting an exception/overflow slot before Monday given the non-movable interview date.

transcript.content: escalated to Passport Clinic Coordinator: T-315: Isabel Cruz missed passport clinic signup while carin

args.body: Handled as time-critical exception request. Driver: Monday visa interview is an immovable external deadline; clinic miss was due to family caregiving emergency (father's fall). Clinic full, so escalated to Passport Clinic Coordinator for an exception/overflow slot rather than standard waitlist. Customer notified.

Hi Isabel,

Thank you for letting us know, and I'm sorry about your father — I hope he's recovering well.

Because your visa interview is Monday, I've flagged this as time-critical and escalated directly to the Passport Clinic Coordinator to request an exception or overflow slot ahead of your interview, rather than putting you on the standard waitlist. I noted the reason you missed the original signup so it's on the record.

You should hear back from the coordinator's office shortly with either a slot offer or next-step options. If you don't hear anything within one business day, reply here and I'll push again. If your father's situation changes or your interview time shifts, let me know right away so we can adjust.

Best,
Support
